No vetoes. NOTE: Gemini MCP default routed to gemini-2.5-pro and RESPONDED (retirement partial?); explicit 3.1-pro-preview pin retained.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: S120-P1 #measure-first-kills-phantom-work: the 15-spread-dominates claim survived 15 sessions as an assumed bottleneck; ONE real instrument (2-peer Playwright duel + REAL 6x CDP Emulation.setCPUThrottlingRate — measured, not analytically multiplied) closed it in one session. Pre-register the GO/NO-GO rule BEFORE measuring: it makes the negative result undebatable and a shippable deliverable (CLOSED-BY-MEASUREMENT), not a failure.

S120-P1 #repo-bounds-beat-speculation: when CHECK attacked the load-extrapolation (could be 8-12x!), the repo already held the answer — the 16KB wire-budget HARD gate (save.replay.test.ts:715) bounded worst-case at 2x. Search the existing test suite for empirical bounds before conceding any speculative multiplier.

S120-P3 #reviewer-execution-claims-are-fabrications: a CHECK reviewer emitted I-ran-it claims (18%-of-runs, byte-184, tick-47) plus citations of NONEXISTENT files/symbols (spatial.test.ts, get3x3Neighbors, a ===0 guard). External reviewers have NO execution environment — auto-distrust every runtime claim; grep-verify every cited symbol EXISTS before spending triage effort. 9th #empirical-refutes-plausible-criticals (promotion-flagged at boot).

SESSION #method #worked: batch PDR with an explicit NO-GO branch let the measurement decide P2 scope mid-session with zero re-approval friction; the docs-only close + truth-maintenance sweep (phase-d prereq row) is real work, not bookkeeping.

SESSION #method #improve: OS session should harden council CHECK prompts with BOTH self-endorsed fixes: Grok [STATIC]/[PREDICTED] tagging + no-execution-claims rule; Gemini constraint-binding pre-computation + 4/5 baseline score cap. Also: pile-test fixtures — derive thresholds from an OBSERVED baseline run, never from analytic guesses (2 retunes wasted).
session_status: S120 3/3 priorities COMPLETE — ANALYZE + handoff next.
analyze_retrospective: S120 ANALYZE — batch 3/3 shipped (P1 measurement eaca05b, P2 phase-b close 543a3aa, P3 grid hoist 3fc6688). All gates green: tsc 0, vitest 1841/1841 (+4 pile), MCV exit 0, bundle 624.4/750, live smoke clean. HEADLINE: the MEASURE-first mandate closed phase (b) with data — the S105-era 15-spread-dominates claim died against a real 2-peer instrument (send is 3-6x build; even 6x-throttled build is 4x under threshold). METHOD (Council-assessed): (1) pre-registered GO rule made NO-GO undebatable and a first-class deliverable; (2) Grok PLAN-phase value HIGH (~65% adoption-to-impact: CDP-throttle demand shaped the decisive instrument; stale-bucket pressure produced the pile gate) but CHECK-phase NET-NEGATIVE (P3: 5/5 refuted, 3 on fabricated symbols/files + invented runtime stats — Grok self-scored 52/100, endorses a [STATIC]/[PREDICTED] no-execution-claims prompt rule); (3) Gemini self-diagnosed rubber-stamp drift (double 5/5/5/5 + W2/W3 math misread — endorses constraint-binding pre-computation + 4/5 baseline cap); (4) repo-bounds-beat-speculation: the 16KB wire-budget HARD gate refuted the 8-12x extrapolation attack — search existing tests for empirical bounds before conceding speculative multipliers. WASTE: minimal — 1 pile-fixture retune (fixture artifact, 2 iterations). OS CARRY-FORWARD: CHECK prompt hardening (both externals endorsed their own fixes); #empirical-refutes-plausible-criticals at 9x is a flagged promotion candidate (gate/rule/eval per boot constitution advisory); model-drift WARN at boot was a resume artifact (session IS Fable 5 owner-selected) but the <synthetic> hook-read deserves an OS look.
